title: Lead qualification recorded
description: A judgement the owner made by hand after working a lead. Append-only: a correction is a new event that supersedes an earlier one, never an edit. There is no `pending` decision - pending is the absence of any event for a lead.

dataClass.description: The payload carries no contact details, but it is a judgement ABOUT a person and must be severed on an erasure request like the lead it references.

qualificationId.description: Identity of THIS judgement, not of the lead. A lead accumulates many.

criteriaVersion.description: Complete contact (phone AND email) + a detailed request + the person replied on some channel (D19). Pinned as a const: a later criteria version is a new event version, so historical judgements never silently re-interpret under new rules.

qualificationStatus.description: `pending` is deliberately absent. Pending is the absence of a judgement, and emitting it would record a non-decision as a decision.

decidedByType.description: Always human at v1. No rule-based or AI qualification exists (D19 4.4.1) and this const is what stops one being added without a contract change.

decidedById.description: The authenticated admin user id that made the call. Not the string 'owner' - once a second operator exists, an unattributable judgement cannot be audited retroactively.

reason.description: Free text, never blank and never defaulted. A defaulted reason looks complete and carries nothing.

supersedesQualificationId.description: OPTIONAL - present when this judgement corrects an earlier one. The superseded event is never deleted or mutated; both stay queryable.
